item.title: Know your airport staff
item.description: FP edit. Wow you guys all really hate your jobs… glad you can relate. Not OC just to be clear. I work for NASA and they’ve been circulating for a while.

item.title: Who's the Sheep Now?
item.description: 1. A randomised clinical trial to evaluate the safety, fit, comfort of a novel N95 mask in children (Dec. 12, 2019) https://www.nature.com/articles/s41598-019-55451-w?fbclid=IwAR3tp6Dcjow_76om38tuzWwKazyPzU4oJOPlwGYCV1tsn9OV90_jHL_KrxM 2. An evidence review of face masks against COVID-19 (Published Jan. 11, 2021) https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7848583/?fbclid=IwAR0BJAXvBAingemyvLTVKEcooqEhypRmIrge_hIULXHlKZ9US3wLI8l6KzM 3. Disposable face masks and reusable face coverings as non-pharmaceutical interventions (NPIs) to prevent transmission of SARS-CoV-2 variants that cause coronavirus disease (COVID-19): Role of new sustainable NPI design innovations and predictive mathematical modelling (Published Feb 21, 2021) https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7848491/?fbclid=IwAR0EjN2yCFlupdEGUZDZq3aAVnhMMSdEi11bsTi70igZMiDMNPWv2aCSOpk 4. The impact of face masks on children—A mini review (Published Feb 21, 2021) https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC8014099/?fbclid=IwAR0Q8eMQ0RvwslgmCvItMNFK2BTaCzV_NJGrznLecTyFzGT8pQD_PpcArX8 5. Face masks against COVID-19: Standards, efficacy, testing and decontamination methods (Published April 29, 2021) https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC8084286/?fbclid=IwAR21Uq021GqOhuiY4OS2JcRp_IOXBJn71vAvIlJt5DLhSuL4jcfHYuVcIQU 6. COVID-19 false dichotomies and a comprehensive review of the evidence regarding public health, COVID-19 symptomatology, SARS-CoV-2 transmission, mask wearing, and reinfection (Published July 27, 2021) https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC8314268/?fbclid=IwAR2jC7Rd2WhE2ZbCo1-eb955uMJ0skvDPoO8l43wjwoSujlMHmr9EPuZzAk 7. How COVID-19 Affects Kids Long Term (Aug 20, 2021) https://www.hackensackmeridianhealth.org/en/HealthU/2021/05/19/how-covid-19-affects-kids-long-term?fbclid=IwAR1hLmvs9f-LVjp1fRF9eXIxz5GC5NfDGWMFbux39D4sxMRq0kkOQ7Yb81s#.Ygxvz-jMK3B 8. The association of opening K–12 schools with the spread of COVID-19 in the United States: County-level panel data analysis (October 19, 2021) https://www.pnas.org/content/118/42/e2103420118?fbclid=IwAR2G5KKrl4okWeGmFhrmPmEeLN3Vb9TVC_0jES-5Vy-7OaJcx8-chRdkHPk 9. What Happens When Kids Get Long COVID? BY KATHY KATELLA (NOVEMBER 2, 2021) https://www.yalemedicine.org/news/long-covid-in-kids?fbclid=IwAR2_u233Bmfad9Xsn7orToO_bScaAt8oDS5U_PocHmoyELByPw32LJAUmZQ 10. How Does Wearing Masks Affect Children? (Page last updated: November 8, 2021) https://covid19.nih.gov/news-and-stories/how-does-wearing-masks-affect-children?fbclid=IwAR1RuTmCsg-WeIKlnjj7qGVBBjXW_SbA7CBXdcUfzc5i6GicQiEHRlnzdkU 11. Science Brief: Community Use of Masks to Control the Spread of SARS-CoV-2 (Updated Dec. 6, 2021) https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/science/science-briefs/masking-science-sars-cov2.html?fbclid=IwAR1zAyjota72jy_Jb_RDAY5oeMGSzNUMRBdQOkqpZ3lNMUEqBXKb80LxJ5M Ooh look an international article…see it’s not just us! 12. Prevalence of ongoing symptoms following coronavirus (COVID-19) infection in the UK (Feb. 03, 2022) https://www.IwAR3mNyv13jKb3U46JceKpwpomkpPHws7YOWgPiFDF2ALcwDc7zlXzFt_CcE

item.title: Cake day dump
item.description:
Really hoping this uploads with sound, the little icon disappeared halfway though making the post
I cropped the TikTok ending, you're gonna have to live with the watermark. With sound because it didn't upload here APPARENTLY: https://imgur.com/gallery/5ErACYc
Mother why
Happy little owl hook
I had to see it so you do too
Majestic dog tax Since they didn't upload with sound here I made a little bonus dump with reposts WITH sound and a few extras as tax: https://imgur.com/gallery/5ErACYc

item.title: Day 263: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Devine Bovine Burger Flattop Seared Beef Patty, Brie & Parmesan Cheese, Horseradish Aioli, Red Wine Jus, Herb-roasted Mushrooms, Kosher Dills, Shredded Lettuce, Chives From The Wren In New York, NY Previous Day 262: https://imgur.com/gallery/ugM4VpG MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD
item.dc:creator: crypto

item.title: A crowd of racist parents hurl insults at 6 year-old Ruby Bridges as she enters a traditionally all-white school, the first black child to do so in the United States South. 1960. Bridges is just 67 today.
item.description: Original source of photograph: https://www.gettyimages.com/detail/news-photo/women-at-william-franz-elementary-school-yell-at-police-news-photo/514875976 Babydoll in coffin: https://imgur.com/ZTnffaa Photo colorized by: https://www.reddit.com/r/HistoryPorn/comments/srlzdx/a_crowd_of_angry_parents_hurl_insults_at_6/hwsgz8l/?c p.s. We have made incredible progress as a society in the advancement of civil rights and equality. There is still so much work to do but there is much hope: https://imgur.com/si2g0mD
item.dc:creator: theshopliftingseagull

item.title: Covidiot
item.description: Called my sister Friday night to let her know what our expectations are for any family or friends wanting to visit after our baby is born (I'm currently 36 weeks pregnant.) I knew she wasn't vaccinated, so I expected some backlash, but nothing like this. I was honestly expecting a civil conversation. Not sure what to do from here.
item.dc:creator: RalphieCuddles

item.title: I’ve started making short videos of my painting
item.description: #art *front page edit* thanks everyone! So much love and support :) more progress on this assemblage piece and more can be found on Instagram (jonnieredbeard) and I’ll post more progress videos here again soon too!!
item.dc:creator: jashw

item.title: Now I gotta beat the 50/50 in 5 years... but we're getting there.
item.description: Last Valentine's Day sucked. Dying sucked too. But as of 1123 PM last night I made it through the year that was supposed to kill me. The struggling to breathe, the inability to walk, take a shower... it really sucked. The pain of learning to stand, learning to wheel around... walking? It all sucked. Every moment was a new learned pain, and a little triumph knowing that as long as I hurt? I was beating the alternative. And so I sit here, listening to the Mountain Goats This Year, wondering if the luck will keep going. Still stuck in a chair for periods, progress is slow and steady but it's winning the race. Thanks for those who have kept in contact and checking on me. I hope all is well for you and yours, and that you have a great day! Dovie'andi se tovya sagain, -The Librarian
item.dc:creator: MidnightLibrarian

item.description: Sauce: https://www.tiktok.com/@captainmcslugs/video/6866068379799670022 It would mean a lot to me if you check out my OC GIF: https://imgur.com/gallery/Ff2tBZX We need more Adventure Time / Futurama crossovers! Hey sexy mama... want to kill all humans? https://imgur.com/gallery/pJpZ4fE Also if you are excited about the upcoming Futurama revival, but not so happy that John DiMaggio (the voice of Bender) is currently missing from the cast, consider signing this petition: https://www.change.org/BenderFuturamaHulu

item.title: What did Men think the Wizards were?
item.description:
This is a short account on what kind of beings that humans thought that the undying Wizards were.
The War of the Ring occurred in year 3019 of the Third Age but already about year 1000 were signs of Sauron's return first felt in Middle-earth. Then the godlike Valar sent as emessaries five Istari, who Men called Wizards. Their task was to inspire peoples against the growing peril (art by Jacek Kopalski).
The Istari were spirits of the same kind as Sauron, but they were not as mighty as him. They "were forbidden to match his power with power, or to seek to dominate Elves or Men by force and fear" (RotK; Appendix A). And they must incarnate themselves "in flesh so as to treat on equality and win the trust of Elves and Men" (Unfinished Tales;IV;II, art by kittyninjafish).
"They came therefore in the shape of Men. though they were never young and aged only slowly, and they had many powers of mind and hand" (RotK; Appendix A, art by Norloth). A handful of Elves knew their true origin, and others guessed that they were servants of the Valar. But except for among the Dúnedain few Men were properly familiar with the Valar or the spirits who served them. So what did humans - the Dúnedain seemingly included - think of the Wizards?
"They first appeared in Middle-earth about the year 1000 of the Third Age, but for long they went about in simple guise, as it were of Men already old in years but hale in body, travellers and wanderers, gaining knowledge of Middle-earth and all that dwelt therein, but revealing to none their powers and purposes." – Unfinished Tales;IV;II, onwards (art by Gabriele Dell'otto)
"In that time Men saw them seldom and heeded them little. But as the shadow of Sauron began to grow and take shape again, they became more active and sought ever to contest the growth of the Shadow, and to move Elves and Men to beware of their peril." In the West this presumably means that the Istari became more active at some time between about 2060 and 2460 (art by Ralph Damiani).
Dates may differ in the East but the outcome ought to been the same (art by TurnerMohan): "Then far and wide rumour of their comings and goings, and their meddling in many matters, was noised about the Men; and Men perceived that they did not die, but remained the same (unless it were that they aged somewhat in looks), while the fathers and sons of Men passed away."
"Men, therefore, grew to fear them, even when they loved them, and they were held to be of the Elven-race (with whom, indeed, they often consorted)." This despite their aged features (though as seen with Círdan of the Havens also Elves could appear old and have beards). The view of the Wizards as Elvish is seen in the name northern Men gave to the Grey Wizard: Gandalf, meaning "Elf-of-the-wand" or "Wand-elf" (art by John Howe).
Some related accounts (art by Ted Nasmith): The Istari https://imgur.com/gallery/CnSexTO Blue Wizards [extract] https://imgur.com/gallery/7z39EBH Saruman https://imgur.com/gallery/T09mRkL Radagast https://imgur.com/gallery/ZwJe2J4 Elf beards https://imgur.com/gallery/qBrS1cm – – – – My Tolkien lore posts index: https://imgur.com/gallery/axV2mPF My Youtube-channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCL-RQ7sj9r1ZQw9Tl8cpPJA
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Form over function
item.dc:creator: anlyin

item.title: Therapeutic posting.
item.description: My juvenile medical records packet was 257 pages (a little more than 1/2 of a standard 500 page ream of paper). I made it 7 pages in and started bawling. I was born ~ 12 weeks premature, to a mother tha made no effort to maintain a lifestyle healthy for prenatal care. I spent the first 72 hours in a heated incubator in a medically induced coma due to an inability to regulate gestational diabetes and what now would likely be described as acute multiple-narcotic dependency. I spent much of the first year quite ill. I was diagnosed as ADHD/ other. I didn’t speak in full sentences until close to my fifth birthday, due to an intense stutter (I spent years undertaking speech therapy, all to have it come out as an adult due to chronic fatigue syndrome). My birth mother had Bi-polar disorder, narcotic dependencies, and what would today be described as Borderline Personality Disorder. As a result I was doped like race horse, with no real ability to self-advocate. Through a childhood marked with abuse, neglect, and events so traumatic, a lot of my childhood is a blur with few shining moments. I was a little bit of a hellion in my youth, with a short stay in juvenile detention (nothing major) - but my time in front of the judge was marred by my birth mother standing up and advising that I was a juvenile delinquent and it would serve the interests of all involved if I was remanded to the state until my 18th birthday. Juvenile medical records showed that I’d seen more chemical cocktails than “reasonable”. And that there was concern the mixture would result in psychological and motor skills impact. Adolescence wasn’t easy, and I was a fighter. When I was 16, my father dropped me in front of the intake office at the Department of Corrections. The intake officer wasn’t on duty; they weren’t accepting wards of the state. We didn’t speak for weeks after that. Through a series of MRI’s, medical records showed what appeared to be a series of healed head injuries and Traumatic Brain Injuries. When I was 18 I dropped off the face of the earth and stopped taking calls from either parents. I’ve since gained a semblance of a relationship with my father but no relationship with my birth mother. I try to be the advocate I wish I could’ve had in my youth, and I try to be the kind of honorable man I wish there were more of in the world. TL;DR I requested juvenile medical records to try to get an understanding of why I have the issues I have. I’m so beyond tired, I don’t have the stomach to be mad. Bad joke to wrap it up: Skeleton walks into a Bar. Bartender asks what’ll it be. Skeleton says a beer and a mop.
item.dc:creator: dumblastname
